TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Wi-ye-na, title = Wi-ye-na, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wi-ye-na} }

S.FORM: == kakaliman == Wi-ye-na-pan " De-yi : Wien (viňźn) , Aw-ti-li-Pa-fa-li-ya- kamu, : Wean (ve…źŐĮn), igu : Vienna mitengil " i/vi'…õn…ô/ vee-EN-…ô" kamu nu De-yi: Wi-n" u Aw-ti-li a suo-tu, u satabakiay nu tukayan, tawya u Aw-ti-li siwaay a pan nu cacayay. Wi-ye-na u Aw-ti-li a sayaway a tukayan, idaw ku 188.9 wang nu tademawan, malaAw-ti-li cen-ce, sakaudip, tatelungan nu lalangawan, Wi-ye-na a tademaw itida i O-mum nu tukayan sausien sakaenem. Á∂≠šĻüÁīćťā¶(Śĺ∑Ť™ě:Wien (viňźn) ; Ś•ßŚúįŚą©-Ś∑īšľźŚą©šļěŤ™ě:Wean (ve…źŐĮn); ŤčĪŤ™ě:Vienna ŤĀÜŤĀĹi/vi'…õn…ô/ vee-EN-…ô; . nilaculan nina tukay u De-yi a sakatusa nu tabakiay a macian, mikilul tu Puo-lin. namaka sabaw pitu katukuh tu tusa a bataan nu secian, atu nikalepacawan, Wi-ye-na taneng malakitakid nu satabakiay a De-yi tukay, hatidaay nu tenesan malaLuo-ma-ti-kuo atu Aw-ti-li-ti-kuo a suo-tu, itida i sayaway a nikalepacawan a Aw-seung-ti-kuo nikalawpesan, Wi-ye-na idaw henay ku tusa a lasubu nu tademawan. itida i Aw-ti-li a walian, micapi tu Cey-ke', Se-luo-fa-ke' atu Sung-ya-li lilisan, uyni a kitidaan malaO-cuo taban nu samucelakay a kitidaan, anu macunus nu idaway tu kakadidengan a Se-luo-fa-ke' tukay nu Pu'-la-ti-se-la-wa, ya Wi-ye-na u idaway nu tulu a lasubuan nu tabakiay a tukayan nu tademawan. pasu tusa a lasubu sepat a bataan a wang nu tademawan, micapi tu Aw-ti-li nu tademawan a palatulu ku cacayayrf. . u Wi-ye-na namahida kasiidaan a dadiw likisi nu nadikudan a zaysang nu babalaki pangangan han " dadadiwan a tukay", itini i kitakid u sayaway a misupitay tu balucu' a saydan ci Si-ke-mun-te.Fuo-luo-yi-de a niyadu' pangangan hn u " tahsepian a tukay". sayaway muenengay itida a tademaw u Kay-e-te' atu Luo-ma a tademaw, kilul sa masumad malateban nu seci atu Pa-luo-ke' zitay a tukay. katinengan, namaka sumamaday nu zitayan katukuh i tusa a bataan nu secian, Wi-ye-na idaw ku sapililidaw nuheni tu tatelungan nu dadadiwan tu O-cuo. Wi-ye-na idaw ku tatelungan nu sasiidaay a misangaay tu luma' nu likisian, pasu Pa-luo-ke a sangan tu cenpaw atu aaidangan, sabaw tu siwa nu hedek itida i Hun-ci dadan idaw ku sangan tu kapahay a luma'an, nituktukan tu tademaw atu aaidangan. Wi-ye-na yadah ku kakakaygian nu masakaputay a kanatalan, pasuLin-he-kuo atu OPEC. OPEC. tusepsepcay mihcaan tatelungan nu Wi-ye-na Ku-cen niyazu'/niyadu' patucekan u Lin-he-kuo kitakit nazikuzan/nadikudan a daysang nu babalaki, tusepcaypic mihcaan pitu a bulad limaden pataydan i kitakit kalihanawan nu liwan namaka babalaki nu dikudan a zaysang nu nganganan. Wi-ye-na kapahay ku nikaudip nu heni, itida i tusepseplim mihcaan a nipikinkiwan, nu sakaudip a cudadan itida i caytupic nu kitakidan a tukayan, u Wi-ye-na itida i kitakitan u sakapahay a nikaudipan nu tukayan, atu Wen-ke-hua atu Ciw-cin-san milecad. 2001 . tusepsepsiw mihcaan tusepcaynem mihcaan a matulin tu waluay a mihcaan, itida i nikilukan tu Wi-ye-na cudadaan nipikinsa u sakacacay. 2009ŚĻīŤá≥2016 . sakaudip Á∂ďśŅü i O-mun nu liwliw, Wi-ye-na u kapahay ku sakauzip/sakaudip, nusicumiay a tademaw inai'ay nu tukayan, cacaykayan u tanengay. saan tu tusepseppic mihcaan a sausian,Wi-ye-na itida i O-Mum u sasiidaay a tukayan u sakalalima ku ngangan, mikilul tu Lun-tun, Lu-sen-paw-cen, Pu-lu-say-e atu Han-paw. Wi-ye-na sipangangan tu " katukuh tu Tun-o a lalaliwan", namahida Wi-ye-na a kakakulian atu Cun-o, Tun-o u masasungaayay ku nuheni, itida i tusepsepsip mihcaan O-mum misaahebal tu walian, yadahay nu hekal a kanatalan nu kakakulian hiyan nu heni itida i Cung-o atu Tung-o kanatal a kawaw sipatudu' tu Wi-ye-na ku mikawaway, hakiya i Wi-ye-na patideng tu dadaylian nu mikawaway, namaka Wi-ye-na malingatu patideng tu Cung-o atu Tung-o a icibaan, u Fa-kuo tu sasangan a zayliw u tapang La-fa-ci-tune, De-ku a Han-kaw, Lei-fuo ci-tun atu Pay-e-se-daw-hu. . izaw/idaw henay ku cakayan nu Wi-ye-na i Aw-ti-li tu tuudan kya taneng milihiza/milihida tu Cung-o atu Tung-o masasetset pacakay i iciba tu tuudan, mahida u He-lan pacakayay tu nananuman ci Ta-heng-si-li micakay i Aw-ti-li tu satabakiay nu misibayay tu biluan a kusi, Yi-ta-li lin-he gingku micakay tu Aw-ti-li ginku, Aw-ti-li nu tabakiay a kusi itida namin patideng tu kusi i Aw-ti-li, pasu Aw-ti-li hamin nu ginkuan, Aw-ti-li pasimalan, satabakiay nu kitakidan nu misangaay tu ce-cuan Wi-na-puo-ken atu patelayay Aw-ti-li. Aw-ti-li papaliyunan tu cen-cun u Aw-ti-li a misitekeday a papaliyunan tu cen-cun kitizaan/kitidaan. . Wi-ye-na sabaw tu enem % hakiya idaw ku siwa a lasubuan a lalumaan mikawaw tu sakayliwmah, nika silamian makaala tu 50000 a tun, pasukamulaw, daydam, bilaul ,lami' atu ningzin. u puu' ku sapatahekal tu kapahay a mantaay a lamian i Wi-ye-na makaala tu 70% atu Aw-ti-li 56% ku mantaay a lalamian. Á∂≠šĻüÁīć16 . lalangaw śĖáŚĆĖ Wi-ye-na idaw ku " duo-naw-he a di'tu nu tatayna" a kasenengan nu ngangan, pinaay a se-cian, Wi-ye-na u sumamaday a dadadiwan atu gagagikian a tatelungan, idaw ku sananay u " dadadiwan a tukay", tawyaay nu ce-cye a Wi-ye-na cya-pay, wen-sye a Wi-ye-na-cun atu Wi-ye-na paceba sananay a sin-se-cu-yi-pay, pasu kakanen atu kahuy lalangawan u katinengan namin, naw i Pa-li malecad tu O-cuo lalangawan tusa tatelungan. . Luo-ma-ti-kuo atu Aw-sun-ti-kuo zitay a kasenengan u Wi-ye-na a yadahay nu liwan a sangaan tu luma'an, palu "dadadiwan a tukay" maala ci Pei-du-hun, Muo-ca-te atu Ma-le' nu hatidaay manamuhay tu dadadiwan a tademaw, milaylay tu nuheni a ku-ten-cu-yi dadadiwan a kawaw atu lalangawan namaka babalakiay, sisa kataydaan ku Wi-ye-na nu miliwkauay a tukayan. . patiyamay nu Wi-ye-na miduduc tu Du-naw-he a misangan, patideng i sabaw tu siwa a secian, miliwliw tu malumanay a macimacian nu dadanan yu mahida u cung-se-ci a langat, ayda han u bangcalay a dadan. i liklik nu hung-cen-dadan nu Wi-ye-na idaw ku bangcalay nu cinglaway a sumamaday nu lumaan. pasu Pa-lu-ke-hun a cen-paw, balubaluan nu bawbi nipatideng i sabaw tu siwa a Hun-cen dadanan miduducay a sangan nu luma'an, Puo-u-kun atu sasalamaan, mahida u Pa-luo-ke'-se', Ke-ke-se', atu Luo-ma a sangaan nu waywayan a luma'an, u O-cu nalimaan nu sangan tu luma' a kapulungan. . mikacaway tu picidekan nu Wi-ye-na a subayuan muculil i dadan nu Wi-ye-na i labu nu malumanay a tukayan, tatelungan nu malumanay a tukayan u Wi-ye-na a Se-ti-hun tabakiay nu kiwkayan, ilabu nu malumanay a tukay idaw ku Wi-ye-na kanatal gagagikian, Huo-hu-paw-hung-kun, Aw-ti-li sacinglaway a caculilan nu patiyamay nu Ke-n-ten dadan, idaw ku asu'ay nu tankaw atu liwkan, picidekan nu bangcala a tatamis dadan, idaw henay ku masahicahicaay nu kakanen tu epahan, Cei-se papacupiyawan, sasalukiyawan atu nalimaan a nikulitan, atu hatidaay nu katuuday nu kakanen tu kahuy, idaw ku picidekan nu nikalepacawan nu maudipay henay, makaala tu lasubuay nu likisian. mihmihcaan u tataydaan nu midangay nu tademaw, mahida u Men-cun-kun, Huo-hu-paw-hun-kun, Men-cen-kun atu Wi-ye-na puo-u-kun kitidaan. taydaay midang pilaludan ku yadahay, idaw ku sabaw tusa a buladan ku taydaay i Wi-ye-na milabu tu kulisimasean. Ha-pu-se-paw wan-caw itida i Wi-ye-na a Men-cun-kun maal i Len-he-kuo-cyaw-yi-ke-sya lalangawan masakaputay a liwan namaka babalakiay nu kitakit, u tatelungan a Se-ti-hun tabakiay nu kiwkay u Wi-ye-na a paya. . namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan:
S.PHON: == kakar~…ĺiman == wi-j…ô-na-pan " d…ô-ji : wi…ôn (*i*n) , aw-ti-r~…ĺi-pa-fa-r~…ĺi-ja- kamu, : w…ôan (*…ô**n), igu : *i…ônna mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ " i/*i Ē~ °*n…ô/ *…ô…ô-…ôn-…ô" kamu nu d…ô-ji: wi-n" u ¶iw- ¶in-san mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. **** . tus…ôps…ôpsiw mińß ¶aan tus…ôp ¶ajn…ôm mińß ¶aan a matur~…ĺin tu war~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan, itida i nikir~…ĺukan tu wi-j…ô-na ¶udadaan nipikinsa u saka ¶a ¶aj. ********** . sakaudip ** i o-mun nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, wi-j…ô-na u kapańßaj ku sakauzip/sakaudip, nusi ¶umiaj a tad…ômaw inai Ē~ °aj nu tukajan, ¶a ¶ajkajan u tan…ôŇčaj. saan tu tus…ôps…ôppi ¶ mińß ¶aan a sausian,wi-j…ô-na itida i o-mum u sasiidaaj a tukajan u sakar~…ĺar~…ĺima ku ŇčaŇčan, mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu r~…ĺun-tun, r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw- ¶…ôn, pu-r~…ĺu-saj-…ô atu ńßan-paw. wi-j…ô-na sipaŇčaŇčan tu " katukuńß tu tun-o a r~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺiwan", namańßida wi-j…ô-na a kakakur~…ĺian atu ¶un-o, tun-o u masasuŇčaajaj ku nuńß…ôni, itida i tus…ôps…ôpsip mińß ¶aan o-mum misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu war~…ĺian, jadańßaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a kanatar~…ĺan nu kakakur~…ĺian ńßijan nu ńß…ôni itida i ¶uŇč-o atu tuŇč-o kanatar~…ĺ a kawaw sipatudu Ē~ ° tu wi-j…ô-na ku mikawawaj, ńßakija i wi-j…ô-na patid…ôŇč tu dadajr~…ĺian nu mikawawaj, namaka wi-j…ô-na mar~…ĺiŇčatu patid…ôŇč tu ¶uŇč-o atu tuŇč-o a i ¶ibaan, u fa-kuo tu sasaŇčan a zajr~…ĺiw u tapaŇč r~…ĺa-fa- ¶i-tun…ô, d…ô-ku a ńßan-kaw, r~…ĺ…ôi-fuo ¶i-tun atu paj-…ô-s…ô-daw-ńßu. . izaw/idaw ńß…ônaj ku ¶akajan nu wi-j…ô-na i aw-ti-r~…ĺi tu tuudan kja tan…ôŇč mir~…ĺińßiza/mir~…ĺińßida tu ¶uŇč-o atu tuŇč-o masas…ôts…ôt pa ¶akaj i i ¶iba tu tuudan, mańßida u ńß…ô-r~…ĺan pa ¶akajaj tu nananuman ¶i ta-ńß…ôŇč-si-r~…ĺi mi ¶akaj i aw-ti-r~…ĺi tu satabakiaj nu misibajaj tu bir~…ĺuan a kusi, ji-ta-r~…ĺi r~…ĺin-ńß…ô giŇčku mi ¶akaj tu aw-ti-r~…ĺi ginku, aw-ti-r~…ĺi nu tabakiaj a kusi itida namin patid…ôŇč tu kusi i aw-ti-r~…ĺi, pasu aw-ti-r~…ĺi ńßamin nu ginkuan, aw-ti-r~…ĺi pasimar~…ĺan, satabakiaj nu kitakidan nu misaŇčaaj tu ¶…ô- ¶uan wi-na-puo-k…ôn atu pat…ôr~…ĺajaj aw-ti-r~…ĺi. aw-ti-r~…ĺi papar~…ĺijunan tu ¶…ôn- ¶un u aw-ti-r~…ĺi a misit…ôk…ôdaj a papar~…ĺijunan tu ¶…ôn- ¶un kitizaan/kitidaan. . wi-j…ô-na sabaw tu …ôn…ôm % ńßakija idaw ku siwa a r~…ĺasubuan a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan mikawaw tu sakajr~…ĺiwmańß, nika sir~…ĺamian makaar~…ĺa tu ***** a tun, pasukamur~…ĺaw, dajdam, bir~…ĺaur~…ĺ ,r~…ĺami Ē~ ° atu niŇčzin. u puu Ē~ ° ku sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu kapańßaj a mantaaj a r~…ĺamian i wi-j…ô-na makaar~…ĺa tu **% atu aw-ti-r~…ĺi **% ku mantaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺamian. ***** . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw ** wi-j…ô-na idaw ku " duo-naw-ńß…ô a di Ē~ °tu nu tatajna" a kas…ôn…ôŇčan nu ŇčaŇčan, pinaaj a s…ô- ¶ian, wi-j…ô-na u sumamadaj a dadadiwan atu gagagikian a tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan, idaw ku sananaj u " dadadiwan a tukaj", tawjaaj nu ¶…ô- ¶j…ô a p…ôi-du-ńßun, muo- ¶a-t…ô atu ma-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ ° nu ńßatidaaj manamuńßaj tu dadadiwan a tad…ômaw, mir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj tu nuńß…ôni a ku-t…ôn- ¶u-ji dadadiwan a kawaw atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan namaka babar~…ĺakiaj, sisa katajdaan ku wi-j…ô-na nu mir~…ĺiwkauaj a tukajan. . patijamaj nu wi-j…ô-na midudu ¶ tu du-naw-ńß…ô a misaŇčan, patid…ôŇč i sabaw tu siwa a s…ô ¶ian, mir~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw tu mar~…ĺumanaj a ma ¶ima ¶ian nu dadanan ju mańßida u ¶uŇč-s…ô- ¶i a r~…ĺaŇčat, ajda ńßan u baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a dadan. i r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu ńßuŇč- ¶…ôn-dadan nu wi-j…ô-na idaw ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj nu ¶iŇčr~…ĺawaj a sumamadaj nu r~…ĺumaan. pasu pa-r~…ĺu-k…ô-ńßun a ¶…ôn-paw, bar~…ĺubar~…ĺuan nu bawbi nipatid…ôŇč i sabaw tu siwa a ńßun- ¶…ôn dadanan midudu ¶aj a saŇčan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, puo-u-kun atu sasar~…ĺamaan, mańßida u pa-r~…ĺuo-k…ô Ē~ °-s…ô Ē~ °, k…ô-k…ô-s…ô Ē~ °, atu r~…ĺuo-ma a saŇčaan nu wajwajan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, u o- ¶u nar~…ĺimaan nu saŇčan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a kapur~…ĺuŇčan. . mika ¶awaj tu pi ¶id…ôkan nu wi-j…ô-na a subajuan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i dadan nu wi-j…ô-na i r~…ĺabu nu mar~…ĺumanaj a tukajan, tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu mar~…ĺumanaj a tukajan u wi-j…ô-na a s…ô-ti-ńßun tabakiaj nu kiwkajan, ir~…ĺabu nu mar~…ĺumanaj a tukaj idaw ku wi-j…ô-na kanatar~…ĺ gagagikian, ńßuo-ńßu-paw-ńßuŇč-kun, aw-ti-r~…ĺi sa ¶iŇčr~…ĺawaj a ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu patijamaj nu k…ô-n-t…ôn dadan, idaw ku asu Ē~ °aj nu tankaw atu r~…ĺiwkan, pi ¶id…ôkan nu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺa a tatamis dadan, idaw ńß…ônaj ku masańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj nu kakan…ôn tu …ôpańßan, ¶…ôi-s…ô papa ¶upijawan, sasar~…ĺukijawan atu nar~…ĺimaan a nikur~…ĺitan, atu ńßatidaaj nu katuudaj nu kakan…ôn tu kańßuj, idaw ku pi ¶id…ôkan nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu maudipaj ńß…ônaj, makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺasubuaj nu r~…ĺikisian. mińßmińß ¶aan u tatajdaan nu midaŇčaj nu tad…ômaw, mańßida u m…ôn- ¶un-kun, ńßuo-ńßu-paw-ńßun-kun, m…ôn- ¶…ôn-kun atu wi-j…ô-na puo-u-kun kitidaan. tajdaaj midaŇč pir~…ĺar~…ĺudan ku jadańßaj, idaw ku sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺadan ku tajdaaj i wi-j…ô-na mir~…ĺabu tu kur~…ĺisimas…ôan. ńßa-pu-s…ô-paw wan- ¶aw itida i wi-j…ô-na a m…ôn- ¶un-kun maar~…ĺ i r~…ĺ…ôn-ńß…ô-kuo- ¶jaw-ji-k…ô-sja r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan masakaputaj a r~…ĺiwan namaka babar~…ĺakiaj nu kitakit, u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan a s…ô-ti-ńßun tabakiaj nu kiwkaj u wi-j…ô-na a paja. . namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan:
S.FORM: == kakaliman == Wi-ye-na-pan " De-yi : Wien (viňźn) , Aw-ti-li-Pa-fa-li-ya- kamu, : Wean (ve…źŐĮn), igu : Vienna mitengil " i/vi'…õn…ô/ vee-EN-…ô" kamu nu De-yi: Wi-n" u Aw-ti-li a suo-tu, u satabakiay nu tukayan, tawya u Aw-ti-li siwaay a pan nu cacayay. Wi-ye-na u Aw-ti-li a sayaway a tukayan, idaw ku 188.9 wang nu tademawan, malaAw-ti-li cen-ce, sakaudip, tatelungan nu lalangawan, Wi-ye-na a tademaw itida i O-mum nu tukayan sausien sakaenem. Á∂≠šĻüÁīćťā¶(Śĺ∑Ť™ě:Wien (viňźn) ; Ś•ßŚúįŚą©-Ś∑īšľźŚą©šļěŤ™ě:Wean (ve…źŐĮn); ŤčĪŤ™ě:Vienna ŤĀÜŤĀĹi/vi'…õn…ô/ vee-EN-…ô; . nilaculan nina tukay u De-yi a sakatusa nu tabakiay a macian, mikilul tu Puo-lin. namaka sabaw pitu katukuh tu tusa a bataan nu secian, atu nikalepacawan, Wi-ye-na taneng malakitakid nu satabakiay a De-yi tukay, hatidaay nu tenesan malaLuo-ma-ti-kuo atu Aw-ti-li-ti-kuo a suo-tu, itida i sayaway a nikalepacawan a Aw-seung-ti-kuo nikalawpesan, Wi-ye-na idaw henay ku tusa a lasubu nu tademawan. itida i Aw-ti-li a walian, micapi tu Cey-ke', Se-luo-fa-ke' atu Sung-ya-li lilisan, uyni a kitidaan malaO-cuo taban nu samucelakay a kitidaan, anu macunus nu idaway tu kakadidengan a Se-luo-fa-ke' tukay nu Pu'-la-ti-se-la-wa, ya Wi-ye-na u idaway nu tulu a lasubuan nu tabakiay a tukayan nu tademawan. pasu tusa a lasubu sepat a bataan a wang nu tademawan, micapi tu Aw-ti-li nu tademawan a palatulu ku cacayayrf. . u Wi-ye-na namahida kasiidaan a dadiw likisi nu nadikudan a zaysang nu babalaki pangangan han " dadadiwan a tukay", itini i kitakid u sayaway a misupitay tu balucu' a saydan ci Si-ke-mun-te.Fuo-luo-yi-de a niyadu' pangangan hn u " tahsepian a tukay". sayaway muenengay itida a tademaw u Kay-e-te' atu Luo-ma a tademaw, kilul sa masumad malateban nu seci atu Pa-luo-ke' zitay a tukay. katinengan, namaka sumamaday nu zitayan katukuh i tusa a bataan nu secian, Wi-ye-na idaw ku sapililidaw nuheni tu tatelungan nu dadadiwan tu O-cuo. Wi-ye-na idaw ku tatelungan nu sasiidaay a misangaay tu luma' nu likisian, pasu Pa-luo-ke a sangan tu cenpaw atu aaidangan, sabaw tu siwa nu hedek itida i Hun-ci dadan idaw ku sangan tu kapahay a luma'an, nituktukan tu tademaw atu aaidangan. Wi-ye-na yadah ku kakakaygian nu masakaputay a kanatalan, pasuLin-he-kuo atu OPEC. OPEC. tusepsepcay mihcaan tatelungan nu Wi-ye-na Ku-cen niyazu'/niyadu' patucekan u Lin-he-kuo kitakit nazikuzan/nadikudan a daysang nu babalaki, tusepcaypic mihcaan pitu a bulad limaden pataydan i kitakit kalihanawan nu liwan namaka babalaki nu dikudan a zaysang nu nganganan. Wi-ye-na kapahay ku nikaudip nu heni, itida i tusepseplim mihcaan a nipikinkiwan, nu sakaudip a cudadan itida i caytupic nu kitakidan a tukayan, u Wi-ye-na itida i kitakitan u sakapahay a nikaudipan nu tukayan, atu Wen-ke-hua atu Ciw-cin-san milecad. 2001 . tusepsepsiw mihcaan tusepcaynem mihcaan a matulin tu waluay a mihcaan, itida i nikilukan tu Wi-ye-na cudadaan nipikinsa u sakacacay. 2009ŚĻīŤá≥2016 . sakaudip Á∂ďśŅü i O-mun nu liwliw, Wi-ye-na u kapahay ku sakauzip/sakaudip, nusicumiay a tademaw inai'ay nu tukayan, cacaykayan u tanengay. saan tu tusepseppic mihcaan a sausian,Wi-ye-na itida i O-Mum u sasiidaay a tukayan u sakalalima ku ngangan, mikilul tu Lun-tun, Lu-sen-paw-cen, Pu-lu-say-e atu Han-paw. Wi-ye-na sipangangan tu " katukuh tu Tun-o a lalaliwan", namahida Wi-ye-na a kakakulian atu Cun-o, Tun-o u masasungaayay ku nuheni, itida i tusepsepsip mihcaan O-mum misaahebal tu walian, yadahay nu hekal a kanatalan nu kakakulian hiyan nu heni itida i Cung-o atu Tung-o kanatal a kawaw sipatudu' tu Wi-ye-na ku mikawaway, hakiya i Wi-ye-na patideng tu dadaylian nu mikawaway, namaka Wi-ye-na malingatu patideng tu Cung-o atu Tung-o a icibaan, u Fa-kuo tu sasangan a zayliw u tapang La-fa-ci-tune, De-ku a Han-kaw, Lei-fuo ci-tun atu Pay-e-se-daw-hu. . izaw/idaw henay ku cakayan nu Wi-ye-na i Aw-ti-li tu tuudan kya taneng milihiza/milihida tu Cung-o atu Tung-o masasetset pacakay i iciba tu tuudan, mahida u He-lan pacakayay tu nananuman ci Ta-heng-si-li micakay i Aw-ti-li tu satabakiay nu misibayay tu biluan a kusi, Yi-ta-li lin-he gingku micakay tu Aw-ti-li ginku, Aw-ti-li nu tabakiay a kusi itida namin patideng tu kusi i Aw-ti-li, pasu Aw-ti-li hamin nu ginkuan, Aw-ti-li pasimalan, satabakiay nu kitakidan nu misangaay tu ce-cuan Wi-na-puo-ken atu patelayay Aw-ti-li. Aw-ti-li papaliyunan tu cen-cun u Aw-ti-li a misitekeday a papaliyunan tu cen-cun kitizaan/kitidaan. . Wi-ye-na sabaw tu enem % hakiya idaw ku siwa a lasubuan a lalumaan mikawaw tu sakayliwmah, nika silamian makaala tu 50000 a tun, pasukamulaw, daydam, bilaul ,lami' atu ningzin. u puu' ku sapatahekal tu kapahay a mantaay a lamian i Wi-ye-na makaala tu 70% atu Aw-ti-li 56% ku mantaay a lalamian. Á∂≠šĻüÁīć16 . lalangaw śĖáŚĆĖ Wi-ye-na idaw ku " duo-naw-he a di'tu nu tatayna" a kasenengan nu ngangan, pinaay a se-cian, Wi-ye-na u sumamaday a dadadiwan atu gagagikian a tatelungan, idaw ku sananay u " dadadiwan a tukay", tawyaay nu ce-cye a Wi-ye-na cya-pay, wen-sye a Wi-ye-na-cun atu Wi-ye-na paceba sananay a sin-se-cu-yi-pay, pasu kakanen atu kahuy lalangawan u katinengan namin, naw i Pa-li malecad tu O-cuo lalangawan tusa tatelungan. . Luo-ma-ti-kuo atu Aw-sun-ti-kuo zitay a kasenengan u Wi-ye-na a yadahay nu liwan a sangaan tu luma'an, palu "dadadiwan a tukay" maala ci Pei-du-hun, Muo-ca-te atu Ma-le' nu hatidaay manamuhay tu dadadiwan a tademaw, milaylay tu nuheni a ku-ten-cu-yi dadadiwan a kawaw atu lalangawan namaka babalakiay, sisa kataydaan ku Wi-ye-na nu miliwkauay a tukayan. . patiyamay nu Wi-ye-na miduduc tu Du-naw-he a misangan, patideng i sabaw tu siwa a secian, miliwliw tu malumanay a macimacian nu dadanan yu mahida u cung-se-ci a langat, ayda han u bangcalay a dadan. i liklik nu hung-cen-dadan nu Wi-ye-na idaw ku bangcalay nu cinglaway a sumamaday nu lumaan. pasu Pa-lu-ke-hun a cen-paw, balubaluan nu bawbi nipatideng i sabaw tu siwa a Hun-cen dadanan miduducay a sangan nu luma'an, Puo-u-kun atu sasalamaan, mahida u Pa-luo-ke'-se', Ke-ke-se', atu Luo-ma a sangaan nu waywayan a luma'an, u O-cu nalimaan nu sangan tu luma' a kapulungan. . mikacaway tu picidekan nu Wi-ye-na a subayuan muculil i dadan nu Wi-ye-na i labu nu malumanay a tukayan, tatelungan nu malumanay a tukayan u Wi-ye-na a Se-ti-hun tabakiay nu kiwkayan, ilabu nu malumanay a tukay idaw ku Wi-ye-na kanatal gagagikian, Huo-hu-paw-hung-kun, Aw-ti-li sacinglaway a caculilan nu patiyamay nu Ke-n-ten dadan, idaw ku asu'ay nu tankaw atu liwkan, picidekan nu bangcala a tatamis dadan, idaw henay ku masahicahicaay nu kakanen tu epahan, Cei-se papacupiyawan, sasalukiyawan atu nalimaan a nikulitan, atu hatidaay nu katuuday nu kakanen tu kahuy, idaw ku picidekan nu nikalepacawan nu maudipay henay, makaala tu lasubuay nu likisian. mihmihcaan u tataydaan nu midangay nu tademaw, mahida u Men-cun-kun, Huo-hu-paw-hun-kun, Men-cen-kun atu Wi-ye-na puo-u-kun kitidaan. taydaay midang pilaludan ku yadahay, idaw ku sabaw tusa a buladan ku taydaay i Wi-ye-na milabu tu kulisimasean. Ha-pu-se-paw wan-caw itida i Wi-ye-na a Men-cun-kun maal i Len-he-kuo-cyaw-yi-ke-sya lalangawan masakaputay a liwan namaka babalakiay nu kitakit, u tatelungan a Se-ti-hun tabakiay nu kiwkay u Wi-ye-na a paya. . namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan:
S.PHON: == kakar~…ĺiman == wi-j…ô-na-pan " d…ô-ji : wi…ôn (*i*n) , aw-ti-r~…ĺi-pa-fa-r~…ĺi-ja- kamu, : w…ôan (*…ô**n), igu : *i…ônna mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ " i/*i Ē~ °*n…ô/ *…ô…ô-…ôn-…ô" kamu nu d…ô-ji: wi-n" u aw-ti-r~…ĺi a suo-tu, u satabakiaj nu tukajan, tawja u aw-ti-r~…ĺi siwaaj a pan nu ¶a ¶ajaj. wi-j…ô-na u aw-ti-r~…ĺi a sajawaj a tukajan, idaw ku ***.* waŇč nu tad…ômawan, mar~…ĺaaw-ti-r~…ĺi ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, sakaudip, tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, wi-j…ô-na a tad…ômaw itida i o-mum nu tukajan sausi…ôn saka…ôn…ôm. ****(**:wi…ôn (*i*n) ; ***-*****:w…ôan (*…ô**n); **:*i…ônna **i/*i Ē~ °*n…ô/ kitidaan mar~…ĺao- ¶uo taban nu samu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj a kitidaan, anu ma ¶unus nu idawaj tu kakadid…ôŇčan a s…ô-r~…ĺuo-fa-k…ô Ē~ ° tukaj nu pu Ē~ °-r~…ĺa-ti-s…ô-r~…ĺa-wa, ja wi-j…ô-na u idawaj nu tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubuan nu tabakiaj a tukajan nu tad…ômawan. pasu tusa a r~…ĺasubu s…ôpat a bataan a waŇč nu tad…ômawan, mi ¶api tu aw-ti-r~…ĺi nu tad…ômawan a par~…ĺatur~…ĺu ku ¶a ¶ajajrf. . u wi-j…ô-na namańßida kasiidaan a dadiw r~…ĺikisi nu nadikudan a zajsaŇč nu babar~…ĺaki paŇčaŇčan ńßan " dadadiwan a tukaj", itini i kitakid u sajawaj a misupitaj tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a sajdan ¶i si-k…ô-mun-t…ô.fuo-r~…ĺuo-ji-d…ô a nijadu Ē~ ° paŇčaŇčan ńßn u " tańßs…ôpian a tukaj". sajawaj mu…ôn…ôŇčaj itida a tad…ômaw u kaj-…ô-t…ô Ē~ ° atu r~…ĺuo-ma a tad…ômaw, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa masumad mar~…ĺat…ôban nu s…ô ¶i atu pa-r~…ĺuo-k…ô Ē~ ° zitaj a tukaj. katin…ôŇčan, namaka sumamadaj nu zitajan katukuńß i tusa a bataan nu s…ô ¶ian, wi-j…ô-na idaw ku sapir~…ĺir~…ĺidaw nuńß…ôni tu ¶ajpi ¶ mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺad r~…ĺimad…ôn patajdan i kitakit kar~…ĺińßanawan nu r~…ĺiwan namaka babar~…ĺaki nu dikudan a zajsaŇč nu ŇčaŇčanan. wi-j…ô-na kapańßaj ku nikaudip nu ńß…ôni, itida i tus…ôps…ôpr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan a nipikinkiwan, nu sakaudip a ¶udadan itida i ¶ajtupi ¶ nu kitakidan a tukajan, u wi-j…ô-na itida i kitakitan u sakapańßaj a nikaudipan nu tukajan, atu w…ôn-k…ô-ńßua atu ¶iw- ¶in-san mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. **** . tus…ôps…ôpsiw mińß ¶aan tus…ôp ¶ajn…ôm mińß ¶aan a matur~…ĺin tu war~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan, itida i nikir~…ĺukan tu wi-j…ô-na ¶udadaan nipikinsa u saka ¶a ¶aj. ********** . sakaudip ** i o-mun nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, wi-j…ô-na u kapańßaj ku sakauzip/sakaudip, nusi ¶umiaj a tad…ômaw inai Ē~ °aj nu tukajan, ¶a ¶ajkajan u tan…ôŇčaj. saan tu tus…ôps…ôppi ¶ mińß ¶aan a sausian,wi-j…ô-na itida i o-mum u sasiidaaj a tukajan u sakar~…ĺar~…ĺima ku ŇčaŇčan, mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu r~…ĺun-tun, r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw- ¶…ôn, pu-r~…ĺu-saj-…ô atu ńßan-paw. wi-j…ô-na sipaŇčaŇčan tu " katukuńß tu tun-o a r~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺiwan", namańßida wi-j…ô-na a kakakur~…ĺian atu ¶un-o, tun-o u masasuŇčaajaj ku nuńß…ôni, itida i tus…ôps…ôpsip mińß ¶aan o-mum misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu war~…ĺian, jadańßaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a kanatar~…ĺan nu kakakur~…ĺian ńßijan nu ńß…ôni itida i ¶uŇč-o atu tuŇč-o kanatar~…ĺ a kawaw sipatudu Ē~ ° tu wi-j…ô-na ku mikawawaj, ńßakija i wi-j…ô-na patid…ôŇč tu dadajr~…ĺian nu mikawawaj, namaka wi-j…ô-na mar~…ĺiŇčatu patid…ôŇč tu ¶uŇč-o atu tuŇč-o a i ¶ibaan, u fa-kuo tu sasaŇčan a zajr~…ĺiw u tapaŇč r~…ĺa-fa- ¶i-tun…ô, d…ô-ku a ńßan-kaw, r~…ĺ…ôi-fuo ¶i-tun atu paj-…ô-s…ô-daw-ńßu. . izaw/idaw ńß…ônaj ku ¶akajan nu wi-j…ô-na i aw-ti-r~…ĺi tu tuudan kja tan…ôŇč mir~…ĺińßiza/mir~…ĺińßida tu ¶uŇč-o atu tuŇč-o masas…ôts…ôt pa ¶akaj i i ¶iba tu tuudan, mańßida u ńß…ô-r~…ĺan pa ¶akajaj tu nananuman ¶i ta-ńß…ôŇč-si-r~…ĺi mi ¶akaj i aw-ti-r~…ĺi tu satabakiaj nu misibajaj tu bir~…ĺuan a kusi, ji-ta-r~…ĺi r~…ĺin-ńß…ô giŇčku mi ¶akaj tu aw-ti-r~…ĺi ginku, aw-ti-r~…ĺi nu tabakiaj a kusi itida namin patid…ôŇč tu kusi i aw-ti-r~…ĺi, pasu aw-ti-r~…ĺi ńßamin nu ginkuan, aw-ti-r~…ĺi pasimar~…ĺan, satabakiaj nu kitakidan nu misaŇčaaj tu ¶…ô- ¶uan wi-na-puo-k…ôn atu pat…ôr~…ĺajaj aw-ti-r~…ĺi. aw-ti-r~…ĺi papar~…ĺijunan tu ¶…ôn- ¶un u aw-ti-r~…ĺi a misit…ôk…ôdaj a papar~…ĺijunan tu ¶…ôn- ¶un kitizaan/kitidaan. . wi-j…ô-na sabaw tu …ôn…ôm % ńßakija idaw ku siwa a r~…ĺasubuan a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan mikawaw tu sakajr~…ĺiwmańß, nika sir~…ĺamian makaar~…ĺa tu ***** a tun, pasukamur~…ĺaw, dajdam, bir~…ĺaur~…ĺ ,r~…ĺami Ē~ ° atu niŇčzin. u puu Ē~ ° ku sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu kapańßaj a mantaaj a r~…ĺamian i wi-j…ô-na makaar~…ĺa tu **% atu aw-ti-r~…ĺi **% ku mantaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺamian. ***** . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw ** wi-j…ô-na idaw ku " duo-naw-ńß…ô a di Ē~ °tu nu tatajna" a kas…ôn…ôŇčan nu ŇčaŇčan, pinaaj a s…ô- ¶ian, wi-j…ô-na u sumamadaj a dadadiwan atu gagagikian a tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan, idaw ku sananaj u " dadadiwan a tukaj", tawjaaj nu ¶…ô- ¶j…ô a wi-j…ô-na ¶ja-paj, w…ôn-sj…ô a wi-j…ô-na- ¶un atu wi-j…ô-na pa ¶…ôba sananaj a sin-s…ô- ¶u-ji-paj, pasu kakan…ôn atu kańßuj r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan u katin…ôŇčan namin, naw i pa-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu o- ¶uo r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tusa tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan. . r~…ĺuo-ma-ti-kuo atu aw-sun-ti-kuo zitaj a kas…ôn…ôŇčan u wi-j…ô-na a jadańßaj nu r~…ĺiwan a saŇčaan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, par~…ĺu "dadadiwan a tukaj" maar~…ĺa ¶i p…ôi-du-ńßun, muo- ¶a-t…ô atu ma-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ ° nu ńßatidaaj manamuńßaj tu dadadiwan a tad…ômaw, mir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj tu nuńß…ôni a ku-t…ôn- ¶u-ji dadadiwan a kawaw atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan namaka babar~…ĺakiaj, sisa katajdaan ku wi-j…ô-na nu mir~…ĺiwkauaj a tukajan. . patijamaj nu wi-j…ô-na midudu ¶ tu du-naw-ńß…ô a misaŇčan, patid…ôŇč i sabaw tu siwa a s…ô ¶ian, mir~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw tu mar~…ĺumanaj a ma ¶ima ¶ian nu dadanan ju mańßida u ¶uŇč-s…ô- ¶i a r~…ĺaŇčat, ajda ńßan u baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a dadan. i r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu ńßuŇč- ¶…ôn-dadan nu wi-j…ô-na idaw ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj nu ¶iŇčr~…ĺawaj a sumamadaj nu r~…ĺumaan. pasu pa-r~…ĺu-k…ô-ńßun a ¶…ôn-paw, bar~…ĺubar~…ĺuan nu bawbi nipatid…ôŇč i sabaw tu siwa a ńßun- ¶…ôn dadanan midudu ¶aj a saŇčan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, puo-u-kun atu sasar~…ĺamaan, mańßida u pa-r~…ĺuo-k…ô Ē~ °-s…ô Ē~ °, k…ô-k…ô-s…ô Ē~ °, atu r~…ĺuo-ma a saŇčaan nu wajwajan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, u o- ¶u nar~…ĺimaan nu saŇčan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a kapur~…ĺuŇčan. . mika ¶awaj tu pi ¶id…ôkan nu wi-j…ô-na a subajuan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i dadan nu wi-j…ô-na i r~…ĺabu nu mar~…ĺumanaj a tukajan, tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu mar~…ĺumanaj a tukajan u wi-j…ô-na a s…ô-ti-ńßun tabakiaj nu kiwkajan, ir~…ĺabu nu mar~…ĺumanaj a tukaj idaw ku wi-j…ô-na kanatar~…ĺ gagagikian, ńßuo-ńßu-paw-ńßuŇč-kun, aw-ti-r~…ĺi sa ¶iŇčr~…ĺawaj a ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu patijamaj nu k…ô-n-t…ôn dadan, idaw ku asu Ē~ °aj nu tankaw atu r~…ĺiwkan, pi ¶id…ôkan nu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺa a tatamis dadan, idaw ńß…ônaj ku masańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj nu kakan…ôn tu …ôpańßan, ¶…ôi-s…ô papa ¶upijawan, sasar~…ĺukijawan atu nar~…ĺimaan a nikur~…ĺitan, atu ńßatidaaj nu katuudaj nu kakan…ôn tu kańßuj, idaw ku pi ¶id…ôkan nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu maudipaj ńß…ônaj, makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺasubuaj nu r~…ĺikisian. mińßmińß ¶aan u tatajdaan nu midaŇčaj nu tad…ômaw, mańßida u m…ôn- ¶un-kun, ńßuo-ńßu-paw-ńßun-kun, m…ôn- ¶…ôn-kun atu wi-j…ô-na puo-u-kun kitidaan. tajdaaj midaŇč pir~…ĺar~…ĺudan ku jadańßaj, idaw ku sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺadan ku tajdaaj i wi-j…ô-na mir~…ĺabu tu kur~…ĺisimas…ôan. ńßa-pu-s…ô-paw wan- ¶aw itida i wi-j…ô-na a m…ôn- ¶un-kun maar~…ĺ i r~…ĺ…ôn-ńß…ô-kuo- ¶jaw-ji-k…ô-sja r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan masakaputaj a r~…ĺiwan namaka babar~…ĺakiaj nu kitakit, u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan a s…ô-ti-ńßun tabakiaj nu kiwkaj u wi-j…ô-na a paja. . namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan:
